header.description: Work with your data in a Redis vector index

ragStarterCallout.displayName: Tip: Get a feel for vector stores in n8n with our

load.description: Get many ranked documents from vector store for query

retrieve.displayName: Retrieve Documents (As Vector Store for Chain/Tool)
retrieve.description: Retrieve documents from vector store to be used as vector store with AI nodes

retrieve-as-tool.displayName: Retrieve Documents (As Tool for AI Agent)
retrieve-as-tool.description: Retrieve documents from vector store to be used as tool with AI nodes

update.description: Update documents in vector store by ID

notice.displayName: This node must be connected to a vector store retriever. Insert one

toolDescription.description: Explain to the LLM what this tool does, a good, specific description would allow LLMs to produce expected results much more often
toolDescription.placeholder: e.g. Work with your data in a Redis vector index

embeddingBatchSize.description: Number of documents to embed in a single batch

keyPrefix.description: Prefix for Redis keys storing the documents

overwriteDocuments.description: Whether existing documents and the index should be overwritten

metadataKey.description: The hash key to be used to store the metadata of the document

contentKey.description: The hash key to be used to store the content of the document

vectorKey.description: The hash key to be used to store the embedding of the document

ttl.description: Time-to-live for the documents in seconds

metadataFilter.description: The comma-separated list of words by which to apply additional full-text metadata filtering

prompt.description: Search prompt to retrieve matching documents from the vector store using similarity-based ranking

topK.description: Number of top results to fetch from vector store

includeDocumentMetadata.description: Whether or not to include document metadata

useReranker.description: Whether or not to rerank results
